working_on: Issue close-out campaign C3: historical full-encoded-path wings deep cleanup. Close Issue #41 by extending prune_mempalace.py with --apply-historical-paths mode (sibling to existing --audit-historical-paths), running signal-probe per wing, then bulk-deleting the ~37,634 inaccessible drawers across 9 historical wings (with selective preservation of any high-signal drawers). Direct chromadb-sqlite access bypasses the upstream wing-filter validator per the S-0084 mempalace_rebuild_hnsw template.
declared_scope: Investigate access path (re-confirm S-0084 direct-sqlite pattern works); per-wing signal probe; extend prune_mempalace.py with apply mode (dry-run default, --execute required, pre-flight backup gated, shape-mismatch refuse, optional --preserve-ids); ≥6 new pytests; pre-flight backup palace.S-0092-pre-c3; user destructive-action confirmation before execute; verify post-state via mempalace repair-status + probe_palace.py; close Issue #41; standard shutdown. phase: NA-engine-apparatus
outcome_summary: Closed Issue #41 end-to-end: 9 historical full-encoded-path wings holding 37,634 drawers + 67 closets cleared from the live MemPalace (47,298 -> 9,819 drawers, -79.2%; wings 13 -> 7). Two-pass direct-sqlite signal probe across full population verified zero preservation candidates (0 non-empty tag, 0 non-empty type, all added_by=mempalace, all room=general) — confirms S-0086 R3 #40C 'Recommend retire' hypothesis. Extended engine/tools/prune_mempalace.py with --audit-historical-paths --apply path (was report-only since S-0088); new helper fetch_uuids_by_collection joins embeddings->segments->collections so deletes target each chromadb collection explicitly. Inline-fix discovered during first live apply: 67 closets in mempalace_collection survived the drawer-only delete because collection.delete is collection-scoped — fix-in-context per CLAUDE.md default-to-fix-in-context. Two pre-flight backups retained (palace.S-0092-pre-c3 captures full pre-cleanup state; palace.S-0092-pre-closet-cleanup captures post-drawer-delete state). 8 new pytests; 33 total in test_prune_mempalace.py; mypy --strict + ruff clean. ADR 0056 unchanged (contract layer not touched; this was a tool extension). Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns hold at the post-cleanup baseline. MemPalace MCP confirmed live throughout (7 calls captured: 1 search, 1 diary_read, 1 diary_write, 1 add_drawer, 3 status). Decision drawer captured at paideia/decisions; diary entry at wing_claude.
